ar.err.invalid_response: SwitchBot Cloud returned an unexpected payload.
ar.err.invalid_arguments: Either device_id or device_name is required.
ar.err.not_found: No SwitchBot device matched the provided device_id.
ar.err.ambiguous_target: Multiple SwitchBot devices matched the provided device_name.
ar.err.unsupported_device: The selected device type does not support the requested action.
ar.err.value_required: The value field is required for set_value.
ar.err.invalid_value_range: The value field must be between 0 and 100.
ar.err.invalid_value_type: The value field must be an integer.

uk.err.invalid_value_type: The value field must be an integer.
uk.tool.description: Control a SwitchBot Cloud device from the configured account and return a JSON or text result.
uk.param.dev.description: SwitchBot device ID to look up. Preferred identifier.
uk.param.devname.description: SwitchBot device name to look up when device_id is not provided.
uk.param.value.description: Optional numeric value for set_value actions. Range: 0-100.
uk.err.config_missing: SwitchBot Cloud credentials are missing. Set UAGENT_SWITCHBOT_TOKEN and UAGENT_SWITCHBOT_SECRET.

vi.err.invalid_response: SwitchBot Cloud returned an unexpected payload.
vi.err.invalid_arguments: Either device_id or device_name is required.
vi.err.not_found: No SwitchBot device matched the provided device_id.
vi.err.ambiguous_target: Multiple SwitchBot devices matched the provided device_name.
vi.err.unsupported_device: The selected device type does not support the requested action.
vi.err.value_required: The value field is required for set_value.
vi.err.invalid_value_range: The value field must be between 0 and 100.
vi.err.invalid_value_type: The value field must be an integer.
